import io
import string

fn upper_first(_ w: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(w)
  if n == 0
    w
  else
    match string.byte_at(w, 0)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        let upper = b - 32
        let rest = string.substring(w, 1, n)
        "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
      else
        w
      end
    when None
      w
    end
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut current = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if string.len(current) > 0
          let w = upper_first(current)
          if first
            result = w
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{w}"
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    let w = upper_first(current)
    if first
      result = w
    else
      result = "#{result} #{w}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
